name: Potential HyperStack Activity
notes: This rule detects Turla HyperStack activity which is a backdoor.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Registry, BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Pipe
TD_list: APPLY Potential HyperStack Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Registry, BB:BehaviorDefinition: HyperStack Pipe
RED_list: Event description: Detects Turla HyperStack activity which is a backdoor.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
